TERM SHEET - Project Wattle

Issuer: Southern Cross Analytics Pty Ltd, ABN 51 824 753 556, ACN 004 085 616.
Lead negotiator: Ms Olivia Brown, Tax File Number 123 456 782.

The Series C round size is AUD 8,500,000 and the pre-money valuation is AUD 40,000,000.
Closing Date is 30 September 2026, subject to confirmatory due diligence.

Contact: olivia.brown@example.com.au. This term sheet is confidential until announcement.
